_comment: Effect definitions for Realm of Shadow. Each effect can be slotted into one of the party's 4 effect slots. Duration is a step count or 'permanent'. Requirements use ALL-match logic: every listed field must be satisfied. For class/race, the party must have a member of that class/race. For max_level, the party's highest level must be at or below that value. Effects with 'item_granted: true' are granted by equipped items via items.json grants_effect — they live in a separate item-granted lane and do NOT consume one of the 4 party effect slots.

effects.name: Detect Traps
effects.description: Traps are revealed before the party steps on them.

effects.name: Infravision
effects.description: Dwarven eyes pierce the darkness, revealing the world in shades of red.

effects.name: Galadriel's Light
effects.description: Elven starlight illuminates the darkness with a soft blue radiance. Lasts 500 steps.

effects.name: Sun Sword Aura
effects.description: The Sun Sword sheds a warm golden light, illuminating the area around its wielder.
